name: extract-rules-from-url.sh --shape markdown-headings behavior is byte-identical after adding 3 new shapes
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r04-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf '# Doc
## A
prose a
## B
prose b
' > $OUT/s.md; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source $OUT/s.md --shape markdown-headings --source-id r04 --json 2>e.err | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d))' > n.out; N=$(cat n.out); grep -q 'shape=markdown-headings' e.err && [ "$N" = "2" ] && echo markdown-headings-regression 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
